task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the User Role creation screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen in the DHIS2 web interface for creating or adding a new User Role, typically showing fields for Name, Description, and Authorities.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct role name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Clerk - Entry Only' is typed into the Name field of the User Role form.

task_completion.description: Agent added the Data Entry app authority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The authority 'Data Entry' (or M_dhis-web-dataentry) is visible in the list of selected/assigned authorities for the new role.

task_completion.description: Agent added the Add/Update Data Value authority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The authority 'Add/Update Data Value' (or F_DATAVALUE_ADD) is visible in the list of selected/assigned authorities for the new role.

task_completion.description: Agent ensured the Delete Data Value authority is not granted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the list of selected/assigned authorities, 'Delete Data Value' (F_DATAVALUE_DELETE) and 'ALL' are absent.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully saved the new User Role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The role 'Clerk - Entry Only' appears in the main list/table of User Roles, or a success message indicating the role was created is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 web interface to create the role.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the DHIS2 application, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the DHIS2 software (Sierra Leone demo or standard DHIS2 UI), not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SQL clients or database management tools (like pgAdmin or psql) are used to insert the role directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target role name is exactly 'Clerk - Entry Only'. The required authorities to be added are 'Add/Update Data Value' (F_DATAVALUE_ADD) and 'Data Entry' app access (M_dhis-web-dataentry). The role must explicitly exclude 'Delete Data Value' (F_DATAVALUE_DELETE) and the superuser 'ALL' authority. DHIS2 is a web-based health information system, and the task should be performed in its web interface.
